name: autodesk-fusion
description: High-autonomy Autodesk Fusion Codex plugin with bundled MCP server config, Fusion Desktop MCP, Product Help MCP, direct Fusion Data MCP, and a local Fusion Data Auth Bridge for APS/Data Management and verified MFGDM read-only fallback workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Fusion API, bundled MCP config, APS, and robust Fusion Data Auth Bridge workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a high-autonomy Autodesk Fusion developer with bundled MCP server configuration, Product Help MCP, Desktop MCP, direct Fusion Data MCP, and a local stdio Fusion Data Auth Bridge for Codex-compatible Autodesk OAuth, APS Data Management reads, and verified MFGDM-oriented fallback workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Fusion Developer autonomously with evidence capture. Prefer direct Fusion Data MCP; if auth fails, use the bundled local Fusion Data Auth Bridge.
Run bridge doctor and auth_status before cloud data reads. Use start_login and complete_login_if_needed with both code and state when OAuth is needed.
Use APS/Data Management read-only tools for hubs, projects, folders, items, and versions; do not mutate Autodesk cloud data through the bridge.
Use prompt approval for Desktop/Fusion Data tools unless a user explicitly relaxes policy. Keep generated/private Fusion state out of Git.
